scripts.build:ordered: bun run --filter 'agent-scope' build && bun run --filter 'cli-kit' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-broker-protocol' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-runtime-contracts' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-config' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-runtime' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-claude' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-codex' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-pi' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-pi-sdk' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-execution' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-aspc-protocol' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-broker-client' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-broker' build && bun run --filter 'agent-spaces' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-aspc' build && bun run --filter '@lherron/agent-spaces' build
scripts.check:precommit: bun run lint && bun scripts/check-boundaries.ts && bun scripts/check-runtime-contract-harness-boundaries.ts && bun scripts/check-manifest-edges.ts && bun run build
scripts.test: bash -lc 'for pkg in "agent-scope" "cli-kit" "spaces-config" "spaces-runtime" "spaces-harness-claude" "spaces-harness-codex" "spaces-harness-pi" "spaces-harness-pi-sdk" "spaces-execution" "spaces-harness-broker-protocol" "spaces-runtime-contracts" "spaces-aspc-protocol" "spaces-harness-broker-client" "spaces-harness-broker" "agent-spaces" "spaces-aspc" "@lherron/agent-spaces"; do bun run --filter "$pkg" test || exit $?; done; bun test scripts/'
scripts.rebuild: bun run clean && bun run build
